item.title: Dionne Warwick
item.description: Genres: Pop soul, standards Scene: Brill Building Era: 1962–present (primary period: 1962–1971) RYM · Apple Music · Spotify Listen to the way Dionne Warwick navigates the melody of “Walk on By” — the intervals are wide, and the phrasing syncopates against Burt Bacharach’s rhythm track in ways that m...

item.title: Laura Nyro
item.description: Genres: Pop soul, singer-songwriter, progressive soul Scene: Brill Building (adjacent), New York City Era: 1966–1997 (primary period: 1967–1971) RYM · Apple Music · Spotify The piano on “Timer” (1968) shifts from a ballad’s tenderness to a percussive, almost violent intensity in the space of a breat...

item.title: Hal David
item.description: Era: 1950s–2000s (primary period: 1957–1973) Genres: Pop soul, traditional pop, Brill Building Key collaborator: Burt Bacharach (co-writer, 1957–1973) RYM · Apple Music · Spotify Hal David wrote lyrics that sound simple until you try to write one yourself.

item.title: Acoustic Texas blues
item.description: Blues → Acoustic blues → Acoustic Texas blues Period: c.

item.title: Electric Texas blues
item.description: Blues → Electric blues → Electric Texas blues Period: 1942–present Location: Dallas and Houston, later Austin Key influences: Acoustic Texas blues, jazz, jump blues RYM A single-string line that phrases like a horn.

item.title: (1969) Dusty in Memphis
item.description: Artist: Dusty Springfield Released: March 31, 1969 Label: Atlantic Records Producer: Jerry Wexler, Tom Dowd, Arif Mardin Genre: Primary: Pop soul, blue-eyed soul Secondary: Southern soul, smooth soul RYM · Apple Music · Spotify Jerry Wexler brought Dusty Springfield to American Sound Studio in Memp...

item.description: Artist: The Ronettes Released: August 1963 Label: Philles Records Producer: Phil Spector Studio: Gold Star Studios Songwriters: Jeff Barry, Ellie Greenwich, Phil Spector Genre: Primary: Girl group, Brill Building Secondary: Pop soul, soul jazz, rhythm & blues RYM · Apple Music · Spotify The most...
